name: ssh-bridge
description: Mac-only SSH Bridge plugin with real PTY-backed interactive SSH terminal sessions for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Mac PTY-backed interactive SSH terminal sessions
interface.longDescription: Adds MCP tools that let Codex open, read, write, resize, and close interactive SSH terminal sessions through macOS PTY support.
defaultPrompt: Read the current SSH terminal output
Send a command to the SSH terminal
